rationale: The proposed change modifies Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts. Elec. Code §275.001 governs chapter applicability to large cities. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: Sec. 275.001. APPLICABILITY OF CHAPTER. This chapter applies only to a city with a population of 200,000 or more.
_note: Rule text concerns municipal election chapter applicability; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No conflict exists.
